title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 26 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 26 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 26 2026
summary:
Main
Today, the DCE iron ore futures trended strong today, pulling back slightly near the close. The most-traded I2609contract closed at 748 yuan/ mt, up 0.81% from the previous trading session. Port spot prices rose 8-11 yuan/mt from the prior day.
